TextView.android:text: First-time setup: configure vehicle model and permissions
On first install, please grant all required permissions
Select a vehicle model to match camera layout
Adjust scale/offset for the main preview
Correct fisheye distortion in preview (does not affect recording)
Does not affect photo capture or DingTalk commands
Choose where videos and photos are stored
Automatically delete oldest files when limit is exceeded (empty or 0 means unlimited)
When cleanup runs, an extra 20% is deleted (e.g. 10GB limit -> cleanup down to 8GB)
Show recording duration and segment count in the top-right (double-tap to toggle)
Add timestamp watermark to saved videos/photos (video watermark works only in MediaCodec mode; slight performance impact)
Automatically launch app after system boot
Start recording automatically after app launch and keep recording running (long sessions may use significant resources)
When enabled, recording continues with screen off; when disabled, recording stops after 10s screen-off and resumes after 10s screen-on
Wake once every 15 minutes to keep the process alive
Prevent deep sleep so messages can still be received after ignition off (increases power use)
Show floating record button; tap to open app
Press the custom key above the speed threshold to open/exit EVCam preview (Longying-1 models only)

• Permissions: manage all required app permissions
• Vehicle Model: choose a model to match camera layout
• Recording Mode: - Auto: selects the best option based on model - MediaRecorder: system hardware encoding - MediaCodec: software encoding option
• Segment Duration: maximum length of each video segment - 1 min: smaller files, easy to share - 3 min: balanced size and continuity - 5 min: fewer files
• Storage Location: - Internal: /DCIM/EVCam_Video/ - USB drive: USB/DCIM/ (permission required) - USB mode uses buffered transfer (writes internally first, then copies segments to USB asynchronously)
• Auto Cleanup: - Set separate limits for videos and photos - Auto-check after 30s cold start and every hour - Deletes oldest files when limits are exceeded (empty or 0 = unlimited)
• Recording Status Overlay: - Shows recording time and segment count in the top-right - Double-tap to quickly show/hide
• Timestamp Watermark: - Adds time watermark to top-left of saved videos/photos - Affects saved files only (not preview) - Video watermark supports MediaCodec only
• Auto Start on Boot: run automatically after system boot
• Auto-start Recording: - Automatically start recording on app launch - Automatically resume recording when returning from background - Uses foreground service to keep recording stable
• Screen-off Recording (Parked): - Available only when Auto-start Recording is enabled - On: keeps recording when screen is off - Off: stops recording after 10s screen-off - Resumes recording after 10s screen-on
• Periodic Keep-alive: wakes every 15 minutes
• Prevent Sleep: blocks deep system sleep - Can still receive remote messages after ignition off - Increases battery usage, enable only if needed
• Floating Window: show floating record button
